subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-02-01 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: He was journeying to Najaf, and inasmuch as Mirza Hasan-i-'Ammu was his son-in-law and there existed familiarity between them, he took with him the Blessed Beauty, the Most Great Branch, and the honorable Kalim [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: به نجف می رفت و چون میرزا حسن عمو  داماد او بودند و آشنائی هم بود، جمال مبارک حضرت عبدالبهآء را با آقای کلیم
subcodes.subjects: @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
